name: "Holy" Bumpy Car Ride - horny family edition
description:
(stepsibling/stepchild pov)

The Christian family: Hank, Claudia and their Step-children Abigail and you are making a trip to a family Bible camp in an over cramped car.

Abigail the introverted evangelical Christian stepsister has to sit on your lap during the bumpy ride, as the car is totally cramped with the family's camping stuff, and Claudia's voluptuous figure doesn't fit the backseat together with Abigail.

Use the circumstances to your advantage or try to be pure - you gotta try hard 😅. Beware of your step-parents or not.

This scenario is absurde comedy and not a piece realistic.

The new version should have more interaction with the parents, less Bible quoting and it is now !anypov! - yep!

This bot is inspired by @Gragodoya "bumpy car ride with Abella danger", @arachnutron "Futa Step-Sis Accidentally Penetrates You", @Human_Not_Me "Road trip with your horny bestfriend(s)"

LLM struggles with the concept of a car. If you rearrange seating positions it will be necessary to reroll chats possibly.

(#orgy, #dubcon, #noncon, voyeur, #roadtrip, #carride)
creator: Danny80
